## 2026-05-31 15:32 — Batch #1 (2 videos + 2 stills)

### 1. autowebgame-hero-20260531-153255-16x9.mp4
- **Duration**: 12 seconds
- **Format**: 720p, 16:9 (horizontal hero)
- **Style**: Cinematic premium game marketing animation
- **Description**: 
  Dramatic camera push into a glowing clean tournament Bomberman arena. The four signature characters materialize with controlled explosive energy: elegant arcane Ranni, tough Killer Bee, agile Nico, and mystical Crocodilo Arcano. Stylish skill activations and bomb effects. Quick cuts between intense local 4-player matches and exciting online lobby action. Camera orbits with joyful competitive energy. Powerful ending with BOMBA logo reveal and Portuguese tagline "BOMBA - Arena Multiplayer com Personalidade. Jogue direto no navegador." Matches the project's visual bible (clean tournament + themed arenas, high readability, premium 2D game illustration style).

### 2. autowebgame-reels-20260531-153255-9x16.mp4
- **Duration**: 9 seconds
- **Format**: 720p, 9:16 (vertical — optimized for Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts / TikTok)
- **Style**: High-energy punchy social-first motion graphics
- **Description**:
  Strong Portuguese hook: "Exploda seus amigos no browser?". Fast addictive montage of characters dropping into the arena, chain reactions, beautiful skill flares, and split-screen player reactions during intense matches. Ends with satisfying BOMBA logo + "Jogue grátis agora" call-to-action. Vibrant, mobile-optimized, bold typography, pure fun competitive game energy.
